title: elytrigia lolioides
intro: Elytrigia lolioides, also known as Elymus lolioides, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to Europe and Asia and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Elytrigia lolioides include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Elytrigia lolioides is typically prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
